top_signals.title: Fuji Media’s Real Estate Unit Attracts 1 Trillion Yen Bids
top_signals.summary: Fuji Media Holdings Inc. has received stronger-than-expected interest in its real estate subsidiary, attracting bidders including KKR & Co., Blackstone Inc. and Goldman Sachs Group Inc., people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Small businesses get helping hand with strengthened debt advice
top_signals.summary: Small businesses struggling with finances to receive £4 million funding boost to business debt advice services through the Money and Pensions Service.

top_signals.title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
top_signals.summary: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S., above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

top_signals.title: Coinbase, SpaceX, Meta join DOJ anti-scam operation that froze $3.8 million in crypto
top_signals.summary: Private-sector firms joined the DOJ's "Disruption Week," freezing $3.8 million in crypto and disrupting 1.4 million scam-linked accounts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
